user.title: Albert Heijn login
user.description:
1. Open [the AH login page]({authorize_url}) and log in.
2. The page redirects to an `appie://login-exit?code=...` address that the browser cannot open. Copy that address (or just the `code` value) from the address bar or the error page.
3. Paste it below. The code is single-use and expires quickly, so paste it right away.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect Albert Heijn
reauth_confirm.description: The stored login has expired. Open [the AH login page]({authorize_url}), log in, and paste the new `appie://login-exit?code=...` address or code below.

error.invalid_auth: The code was rejected. Codes are single-use and expire within minutes — get a fresh one and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Albert Heijn API. Try again later.

abort.already_configured: This Albert Heijn account is already configured.
abort.wrong_account: The code belongs to a different Albert Heijn account than this entry.

data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch the koopzegels balance. The balance only changes when you shop, so keep this modest — the API is unofficial.
